UserPromptSubmit.description: Run ESLint before responding to catch obvious issues in modified files

PostToolUse.command:
echo 'Code written. Reminder checklist:
- Entity/Model properties PascalCase?
- @Expose() + @ApiProperty() + validator on all response model props?
- No repository injection in controllers?
- HttpException used (not raw Error)?
- Cache invalidation added to mutation methods?
- @ApiOperation + @ApiSuccessResponse on new controller methods?
- S3 keys built with KeyBuilder([GetStorageOwnerId(user), path])?' 2>&1 || true
PostToolUse.description: Post-write convention reminders for service and model files
